subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The news of thy arrival at thy familiar abode hath reached me, and mayest thou remain safe and protected beneath the shadow of thy Compassionate Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق خبر وصول بمحل مالوف واصل و در ظل رب حنون محفوظ و مصون باشید
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @consolation and comfort
